title: AlternativeOfferSession
description: Open-choice offer session for one hub case. Preserves offer set provenance, current truth tuple, and same-shell continuity while keeping callback fallback separate from ranked rows.

alternativeOfferSessionId.description: Stable identifier for the offer session.

candidateSnapshotRef.description: Current NetworkCandidateSnapshot used to build the offer set.

offerSetHash.description: Stable hash of the ranked offer set shown to the patient or coordinator.

truthTupleHash.description: Current truth tuple hash that governs live selection and commit.

visibilityEnvelopeVersionRef.description: Visibility envelope version that governed offer disclosure.

offerState.description: Current offer-session posture. Superseded or expired sessions remain auditable only.

callbackFallbackCardRef.description: Separate callback fallback card associated with the offer set.

selectedFallbackPath.description: Selected fallback path when the separate fallback card wins.

sameShellContinuationRef.description: Shell continuity anchor that keeps offer review in the same route family.

routeFamilyRef.description: Owning route family for the offer session.

patientChoiceDeadlineAt.description: Deadline for live selection before the session expires.

offerEntryRefs.description: Ranked offer entry identifiers shown in the current session.

provenanceMode.description: Whether the session is still live or has become read-only provenance after supersession.

supersededBySessionRef.description: Later session that superseded this one.

sourceRefs.description: Algorithm source refs carried into the contract pack.

x-sourceRefs: blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5E. Alternative offer generation, open choice, callback fallback, and patient continuity
